description: Fragment of a business letter. InJudaeo-Arabic, in an untrained hand. Mentions names such as Abū Saʿīd al-Sūrī (=al-Surrī?), Abū Munā (=Abū l-Munā) al-Skandarānī; and Abū ʿAlāʾ (=Abū l-ʿAlāʾ) Saʿāda. Also mentions a sum of 50 dinars and various commodities. The handwriting is reminiscent of that of Nāṣir al-Adīb al-ʿIbrī.
